name: brand
description: Six brand specialists: strategy (positioning, narrative, voice, audience), naming (five-category framework, six-step process), identity-system (logo direction, color, type, photography, iconography), voice-tone (attributes with not-X pairings, tone register matrix, filler-words bans), guidelines-composer (9-chapter deliverable, sized to brand context), and audit (drift detection across identity, voice, surface application, governance). Outputs feed the design plugin and marketing plugin.
